layout.description: Board takes the left 70% of the screen. Instructor appears as a small window in the bottom right corner.

assets.name: reaction equation
assets.display_instruction: Show the formula large and centered on the board. It is the main focus of this moment. Give it breathing room.

assets.name: HCl zinc reaction photo
assets.display_instruction: Show the experiment photo below the formula as a supporting visual. It gives the learner a real-world reference for what the formula describes.

transition.instruction: Fade in the board smoothly as this paragraph begins. Do not cut abruptly.

script_display.instruction: Show the paragraph text at the bottom of the screen. Highlight each keyword as the instructor speaks it.

director_note: This is a high-complexity moment. The formula is the core — give it the screen. The instructor steps back into a small corner so the learner focuses on the equation. The experiment photo appears a few seconds in once the formula is established, connecting theory to reality.
